title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 226.600 - Penalty
text:
226.600.  Penalty. — Any person, firm, or corporation violating the provisions of sections 226.500 to 226.600 shall upon conviction be deemed guilty of a misdemeanor, and each day of violation shall be considered a separate offense.
(L. 1965 2d Ex. Sess. p. 900 § 12)
